message:
feat(setup): Thread toolMap through all setup steps for registry-aware display

Complete the tool registry integration across all Setup page steps:

- Thread toolMap prop through VerifyStepContent for verify step cards
- Update confirm modal to use registry display info when available with
  fallback to static getToolDisplayInfo() for backwards compatibility
- Pass toolMap to DetectStepContent and InstallStepContent components
- Ensure consistent registry-driven display across detect, install, and
  verify steps

This ensures tools display with their registry-defined icons, descriptions,
and categories throughout the entire setup wizard flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
